title: ADDIS Cotton Mop Refill, Graphite/ Metallic,White
features: Hygienic Appearance Easy To Rinse Clean
Access All Of Those Niche Areas
From A Brand That Has Been A Part Of The Home Since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Versatile Cotton Strands The versatile cotton strands make it easy to access those niche areas as you mop. They work hard to absorb the moisture whilst giving your floor a thorough clean. Dimensions This mop head is the perfect height to fit onto the mop handle. It's ideal for cleaning in between grout for a streak free finish. Trusted Brand This cotton mop head is from a brand that has been part of the home since 1780 and prides itself on both its quality and value.
